title: Fix Male Shirts category cover image

requirements.text: Save the uploaded photo (IMG-20260119-WA0021.jpg — man in blue printed shirt) as a static asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/male-shirts-cover.jpg` and update the Male Shirts category image mapping in `frontend/src/lib/utils.ts` to reference this file path, replacing whatever value is currently causing the logo to appear instead of the product photo.

quotes: Product image is not showing, my logo is showing in the product category cover.
I want to change the male shirt category cover into this image

acceptanceCriteria: The Male Shirts category card on the homepage displays the uploaded photo of the man in the blue printed shirt, not the dhimayu logo.
No other category covers are affected.
The image renders correctly at the category card dimensions without distortion.

constraints: Do not modify any other category cover image mappings.
Do not alter backend data or product records.
nonGoals: Any backend schema or data changes.

edits: Crop and resize to square category card format, preserving the upper-body shot of the model (IMG-20260119-WA0021.jpg > male-shirts-cover.dim_800x1000.jpg)
